name: Heavy-Duty Square Lockout Padlock
shortDescription: Reinforced square-body padlock with ABS cover for harsh industrial lockout duty.
longDescription: A step up from standard jacketed padlocks for sites where lockout hardware takes a beating — a heavy-duty square body under an ABS protective cover, available with long or regular shackle and supplied with 3 keyrings for quick crew identification.

images.alt: Heavy-Duty Square Lockout Padlock supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
